data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. All 4 acceptance criteria verified. (1) pendingRepoScopeKey in Zustand + useRepoSwitchQueryState hook clears stale content immediately on repo change. (2) keepPreviousData removed from all 3 repo-scoped queries; deriveRepoSwitchDisplayState masks stale data during transitions. (3) Loading indicator persists until fetchStatus=idle and isFetched/error settles. (4) Browser-verified per prior handoff. Tests cover the contract (7 new tests across 2 files). No regressions: background refetches don't blank the screen. Quality gates pass (tsc, test 2392/2392, build clean, lint passes with pre-existing beat-form.tsx warning).
